beer.beer_description: Who Are you is a brand new Ice Cream Sour Ale that leans all the way into the tropics—fresh pineapple and ripe mango blended into a thick, fruit-forward sour, then draped in silky coconut ice cream for that lush, creamy glow. A touch of agave threads through the mix, adding a soft sweetness that ties the whole thing together. Bright, smooth and loaded with tropical character, it’s an easy escape into pure island dessert mode. What is it? Who are you?

A touch of agave threads through the mix, adding a soft sweetness that ties the whole thing together. Bright, smooth and loaded with tropical character, it’s an easy escape into pure island dessert mode. What is it? Who are you?

items.badge_description: It’s been a long day and now it’s time for a reward. Crisp, tasty and refreshing, enjoy that delicious fruit beer! That's 425 different fruited beers. Try 5 more for Level 86!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 200 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 41.

items.checkin_comment: Sweet sugar thick diabetes overload. Yes.

user.bio:
Well, that's just, like, your opinion, man...

 - The Dude.

user.bio: Give me description give me your take not just scores

items.badge_description: Marshmallow, chocolate, apple pie! Cakes and cookies catch my eye. Churn that butter, twist and shout. Put it in a pastry stout! That’s 155 different beers with the style of Stout - Pastry, Stout - Imperial / Double Pastry, or Sour - Smoothie / Pastry. Check-in to 5 more to get to Level 32.

items.checkin_comment:
More gloopy silliness from the Botany wizards.

Again, it’s just a smoothie. A stupidly thick, overwhelming smoothie that hits you clean in the palate with overripe tropical fruit and something… floral. Agave, they say. We’ll go with that.

Sheesh.

items.badge_description:
Discover Gulp Riverside Taproom on Singapore's Scenic Robertson Quay! With 8 rotating craft beer taps & over 100 beers in our fridges, come unwind with us by the river!
Check in to earn this badge, get rewarded with a beer on us at levels 5/10/15/20

Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 260 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%.  Try 5 more for Level 53!

items.badge_description: Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 25 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 6!

Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 30 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 7!

Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 20 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 5! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

Right about now you’re feeling your face tighten and your taste buds explode. The full pucker is quickly setting in and you can’t get enough. This is the wonder of the sour. That's 20 different Sour Beers. Try 5 more for Level 5.
